options.name: --output-format
options.description: Change output format, allowed values: json, text - default value is text

options.name: --skip-vcs
options.description: Disable version control system changes - default is to tag and commit new version

options.name: --dry-run
options.description: Disable all changes to disk and vcs. Use to see what the changes would have been but without changing the csproj file nor committing or tagging.

options.name: --project-file
options.description: The project file to work on. Defaults to auto-locating in current directory

options.name: --build-meta
options.description: Additional build metadata to add to a `premajor`, `preminor` or `prepatch` version bump

options.name: --prefix
options.description: Override the default next prefix/label for a  `premajor`, `preminor` or `prepatch` version bump

options.name: --message
options.description: Set commit's message - default is 'v<version>'. Available variables: $projName, $oldVer, $newVer

options.name: --tag
options.description: Set tag's name - default is 'v<version>'. Available variables: $projName, $oldVer, $newVer

options.name: --version-property-name
options.description:
Specify which tag from <PropertyGroup> to use as the version tag. Default is Version. Available values: Version, PackageVersion.
Available commands after [options] to control the version bump are:
major | minor | patch | premajor | preminor | prepatch | prerelease | <specific version>
